creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195656
small sed change

The OpenBSD devs found an issue on the weird case in which someone may want to use the '[' character as a delimiter.

The issues are documented here:
http://undeadly.org/cgi?action=article;sid=20180728110010

The second issue is sufficiently non-invasive that I think we can fix it easily but as experience with sed shows, it is sane to run any change through the ports tree first.

Please test.
